coastal-nps-units.label: NPS Coastal Units (LRD authoritative)
coastal-nps-units.source: NPS Land Resources Division — nps_boundary FeatureServer/2 (services1.arcgis.com/fBc8EJBxQRMcHlei)
coastal-nps-units.filter: centroid in coastal state ∩ ≤60 km from Natural Earth 1:50m coastline

coastal-fws-units.label: USFWS Refuges & Approved Boundaries (coastal)
coastal-fws-units.filter: centroid in coastal state ∩ ≤60 km from coast; RSL_TYPE in (NWR, WMD, COORD, NM)
coastal-fws-units.notes: Alaska Maritime NWR and Chincoteague NWR are shown as convex-hull envelopes due to per-feature size; full geometry in network_synth_spatial_analysis/coastal_protected/fws_approved.geojson.

coastal-usfs-special.label: USFS Research Natural Areas / Experimental Forests (coastal)
coastal-usfs-special.filter: centroid in coastal state ∩ ≤60 km from coast; AREATYPE in (RESEARCH NATURAL AREA, EXPERIMENTAL FOREST, BOTANICAL AREA, NATURAL AREA, SCENIC AREA)

coastal-wilderness.label: National Wilderness Preservation System (coastal)
coastal-wilderness.filter: centroid in coastal state ∩ ≤60 km from coast
coastal-wilderness.notes: 16 input units required topology repair via shapely.make_valid before dissolve.

coastal-state-protected.label: State parks, WMAs, preserves, aquatic preserves (coastal)
coastal-state-protected.filter: Mang_Type='STAT' ∩ Des_Tp in (SP,SCA,SRMA,SREC,SHCA,SF,FORE,MPA,SW,WPA,SOTH,HCAE) ∩ coastal-state ∩ ≤25 km from coast ∩ ≥100 acres ∩ multi-word name
coastal-state-protected.notes: Heavily filtered from 16,771 raw PAD-US state-managed parcels; named units only, ≥100 acres, within 25 km of coast.

coastal-ngo-private.label: Land trust + NGO + private preserves (coastal)
coastal-ngo-private.manager: Per-feature (TNC, Audubon, regional land trusts, private)
coastal-ngo-private.filter: Mang_Type in (NGO,PVT) ∩ Des_Tp in (PCON,PPRK,PREC,LP,LCA,LREC,PHCA,PFOR,SCA,SP,SRMA,PAGR) ∩ coastal-state ∩ ≤25 km from coast ∩ ≥50 acres ∩ multi-word name

ramsar-us.label: Ramsar wetlands of international importance (US)
ramsar-us.source: Wikipedia — List_of_Ramsar_sites_in_the_United_States (sourced from Ramsar Convention Sites Information Service)
ramsar-us.manager: Ramsar Convention (designated by U.S. State Department)
ramsar-us.filter: All 40 US Ramsar sites; 18 are in coastal states/territories
ramsar-us.notes: Point features (no polygon boundaries published in machine-readable form).

neon-sites.label: NEON field sites
neon-sites.source: NEON Field Sampling Boundaries — services1.arcgis.com/CMacGMvXwrlrpmOR (Battelle Ecology / NEON)
neon-sites.filter: All 61 published NEON site boundary polygons (Core + Gradient, terrestrial + aquatic).
neon-sites.notes: Polygon features — actual NEON sampling footprints. 20 sites are in coastal states; the rest provide continental-scale context for any coastal-vs-inland comparison. Each site links through to neonscience.org/field-sites/<code>.
